chapter_title.ar: باب الِاسْتِبْرَاءِ مِنَ الْبَوْلِ وَ غَسْلِهِ وَ مَنْ لَمْ يَجِدِ الْمَاءَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – The Istibra’a from the urine, and washing it, and the one who cannot find the water

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن والخيران مرسلن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/64)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن والخيران مرسلن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (13/64)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْبَوْلِ يُصِيبُ الْجَسَدَ قَالَ صُبَّ عَلَيْهِ الْمَاءَ مَرَّتَيْنِ .
وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّهُ يُجْزِئُ أَنْ يَغْسِلَ بِمِثْلِهِ مِنَ الْمَاءِ إِذَا كَانَ عَلَى رَأْسِ الْحَشَفَةِ وَ غَيْرِهِ وَ رُوِيَ أَنَّهُ مَاءٌ لَيْسَ بِوَسَخٍ فَيَحْتَاجَ أَنْ يُدْلَكَ.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al Husayn Bin Abu Al A’ala who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the urine hitting the body. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Pour the water upon it, twice’.

And it is reported that it would suffice him if he were to wash with the likes of it from the water when it was upon the tip of the manhood. And it is reported that it is water and not filth, so it needs to be rubbed.
en.sarwar: 7. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Al-Husayn ibn abu al-‘Ala’ who has said the following: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about urine which pollutes the body. He (the Imam) said, Tour water on it twice.’ It is a narration that one can wash it with the same amount of water if it is on the tip of the penis or on something else. It also is a narration that it is water and not dirt and it needs to be dropped down.’”
